violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the (fryolators, 2 door freezer, and warming drawers) have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The floors around the fryolators have an accumulation of grease, soil residue, and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
The hand-washing sink in the mens restroom was lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024

The freezer located in the cashier area was not in good repair. (Ambient 52 degrees F.) No TCS foods observed in unit at time of inspection. Service already contacted. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024

The wall in the fryalator area and floors in the office have an accumulation of soil residue, grease, food debris and powdery substance. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024
